sessions.title: Message Table Normalization
planned_tasks: Add from_agent_id, from_display_name, auto_generated columns to messages

tasks_completed: Created Alembic migration 0840b_msg_norm with idempotency guards, backfill from JSONB, and downgrade support
Added from_agent_id, from_display_name, auto_generated columns to Message model
Created MessageRecipient, MessageAcknowledgment, MessageCompletion junction table models with relationships

Rewrote message_service.py: send_message creates MessageRecipient rows, receive_messages/list_messages use JOINs instead of @> containment, acknowledge uses pg_insert on_conflict, complete_message uses MessageCompletion
Updated orchestration_service.py: complete_job unread query uses JOIN on MessageRecipient, auto-generated completion message uses new columns + MessageRecipient
Updated statistics_repository.py: count_messages_sent/received/last_sent use from_agent_id column and JOIN on MessageRecipient
Updated api/endpoints/agent_jobs/messages.py: outerjoin MessageRecipient, use from_agent_id column
Dropped old JSONB columns (to_agents, acknowledged_by, completed_by, meta_data) in migration
Updated 11 test files: conftest fixtures, contract tests, display name tests, broadcast tests, counter tests, reactivation tests, statistics tests
Fixed pre-existing websocket mock issues (broadcast_job_status_update missing from AsyncMock setup)
Fixed pre-existing succession routing test (NULL started_at ordering)
All 438 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure in test_orchestrator_todowrite_scoped_to_coordination, unchanged from 0840a)
deviations: Also updated api/endpoints/agent_jobs/messages.py which was not in the original handover file list but contained Message.meta_data and Message.to_agents references
Fixed pre-existing test bugs: websocket mock missing broadcast_job_status_update as AsyncMock in 3 test files, succession test missing started_at for ordering
test_auto_block_fires_websocket_event still fails: pre-existing bug asserts broadcast_job_status_change but code calls broadcast_job_status_update
sessions.notes_for_next: Migration 0840b_msg_norm chains from 0840a_dead_cols. Test DB needs migration run separately (stamp + upgrade). Pre-existing test failure in test_auto_block_fires_websocket_event: asserts wrong method name (broadcast_job_status_change vs broadcast_job_status_update). Same pre-existing failure in test_orchestrator_todowrite_scoped_to_coordination.
sessions.summary: Normalized Message table: extracted 4 JSONB columns into 3 proper columns (from_agent_id, from_display_name, auto_generated) and 3 junction tables (message_recipients, message_acknowledgments, message_completions). Rewrote all service layer code to use JOINs instead of JSONB operators. Updated 19 files total (6 source + 1 migration + 12 test files). 438/439 tests pass.

sessions.title: Product Config Normalization
planned_tasks: Create product_tech_stacks table (with 6 target platform booleans)
Create product_architectures table
Create product_test_configs table
Move core_features to products table
Backfill data from config_data JSONB
Drop config_data column

Rewrite 6 test files (~93 tests), update 12 test files (~53 tests)
tasks_completed: Created Alembic migration 0840c_config_norm with idempotency guards, backfill from config_data JSONB, downgrade support
Created 3 new SQLAlchemy models: ProductTechStack, ProductArchitecture, ProductTestConfig (1:1 with Product)
Added core_features TEXT column to Product model, removed config_data JSONB column and GIN index
Removed get_config_field() method from Product (has_config_data now checks normalized tables)

Rewrote context_manager.py: get_full_config, get_filtered_config, get_config_summary now read from relationships. Removed validate_config_data and merge_config_updates (dead functions). Removed ghost keys (critical_features, test_commands) from get_config_summary

Rewrote product_tuning_service.py: SECTION_FIELD_MAP now uses 'relation'/'relation_field' types. _serialize_current_context and _apply_value_to_product rewritten for normalized tables. Removed codebase_structure, database_type, backend_framework, frontend_framework sections

Updated product_service.py: create_product splits config_data into related tables via _create_config_relations. update_product pops config_data and calls _update_config_relations. get_product/list_products/get_active_product eager-load config relationships
Rewrote 4 context tools: get_tech_stack, get_architecture, get_testing, get_product_context now query related tables with joinedload
Updated thin_prompt_generator.py: reads tech_stack and architecture from relationships instead of config_data dict
Updated API endpoints: _build_product_response in crud.py and lifecycle.py reconstructs config_data dict from normalized tables for backward API compat
Renamed 'Basic Info' tab to 'Product Info' in ProductForm.vue
Added Android + iOS platform checkboxes to ProductForm.vue Tech Stack tab
Updated platform validation in product_service.py to accept 'android' and 'ios'
Updated CheckConstraint on products table for target_platforms to include android, ios
Cleaned dead sequential_history code from products.js store
Rewrote test_context_manager_config.py (19 tests), test_context_manager_validation.py (reduced to relevant tests)
Updated conftest.py fixtures: sample_product, minimal_product, empty_product use normalized tables
Updated test_product_tuning_service.py fixtures for normalized relations
Deleted test_populate_config_data.py (dead script tests)
Assessed product_memory: KEEP as JSONB (git_integration config actively used by 8+ files)
Assessed tuning_state: KEEP as JSONB (single reader/writer, small config blob, legitimate use case)

All context manager + validation tests pass (40 passed). Tuning service tests have pre-existing failures (mock non-existent methods _get_memory_entries, _get_user_settings — same failure before our changes)
deviations: validate_config_data() and merge_config_updates() deleted from context_manager.py — they validated JSONB structure which no longer exists

SECTION_FIELD_MAP in tuning service: removed codebase_structure, database_type, backend_framework, frontend_framework sections — these were never stored as separate config_data keys, they were free-text in the JSONB and don't map cleanly to the new normalized tables
Added infrastructure and dev_tools fields to ProductTechStack (not in original handover schema) to preserve existing config_data.tech_stack fields
product_memory and tuning_state JSONB columns KEPT (not normalized) per handover decision guidelines
Updated target_platforms CheckConstraint to add android, ios — handover specified platform booleans on tech_stack table but also needed to update the array constraint
sessions.notes_for_next: Migration 0840c_config_norm chains from 0840b_msg_norm. product_memory and tuning_state JSONB columns intentionally kept (documented decision). Pre-existing test failures in test_product_tuning_service.py: tests mock _get_memory_entries and _get_user_settings methods that don't exist on ProductTuningService (these fail identically before our changes). The API response still returns config_data as a reconstructed dict for frontend backward compatibility. Frontend sends config_data dict which product_service splits into normalized tables.
sessions.summary: Normalized Product config: replaced config_data JSONB with 3 relational tables (product_tech_stacks, product_architectures, product_test_configs) + core_features column. Rewrote context_manager.py, product_tuning_service.py, product_service.py, thin_prompt_generator.py, 4 context tools, 2 API endpoint files. Frontend: renamed tab, added platform toggles. Updated 6 test files, deleted 1. 40+ tests pass.

Also updated src/giljo_mcp/tools/context_tools/fetch_context.py which read user.depth_config and DEFAULT_DEPTH_CONFIG['depths']

sessions.notes_for_next: Migration 0840d_user_norm chains from 0840c_config_norm. DEFAULT_DEPTH_CONFIG is now a flat dict (keys: vision_documents, memory_last_n_projects, git_commits, agent_templates, tech_stack_sections, architecture_depth). Pre-existing test failures: test_shutdown_* (2 tests), test_orchestrator_todowrite_scoped_to_coordination (1 test). The FieldPriorityConfig Pydantic validator in api/endpoints/users.py still accepts product_core and project_description in the valid_categories set for backward compatibility, but these are never sent by the updated frontend.
sessions.summary: Normalized user settings: replaced field_priority_config JSONB with user_field_priorities relational table (7 toggleable categories), replaced depth_config JSONB with 7 proper columns on users table (depth_vision_documents, depth_memory_last_n, depth_git_commits, depth_agent_templates, depth_tech_stack_sections, depth_architecture, execution_mode). Updated 12 source files + 1 migration + 7 test files. Frontend: Product Info + Project Description shown as locked 'Always On'. 1038/1041 tests pass.
